query:
CREATE TABLE `matches` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`matchDate` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
	`title` varchar(200),
	`team1Name` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '팀 1',
	`team2Name` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '팀 2',
	`winner` int NOT NULL,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `matches_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3vSJiBVk9xuCvpz.root --database Sx8KwPTwqdiAXxUu5eKWSU --execute CREATE TABLE `matches` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`matchDate` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
	`title` varchar(200),
	`team1Name` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '팀 1',
	`team2Name` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '팀 2',
	`winner` int NOT NULL,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `matches_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
